title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins designed to improve development speed and reduce token costs. Plugins include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield MCP, Anthropic skill/legal/design/security tools, OpenAI Codex, BuildPartner, Morph, and Codeburn. The video demonstrates practical extensions for web scraping, media generation, model swapping, and cost monitoring.
